creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
on 18 Feb 2015, x11-wm/e-module-diskio was marked as broken.

However, e-module-diskio is a mandatory run-time dependency of x11-wm/e-modules, which in effect means that port is broken too.

Since the fix for e-module-diskio is clearly not imminent (6 days has already passed) I recommend that the e-diskio be removed as a run-depends for e-modules immediately.  When e-diskio is fixed, then it can be added back.  That's my opinion anyway.
